_comment_1: Law 1: The Daily Limit. You cannot force an employee to work two shifts in the same 24-hour period.
_comment_2: Law 2: The Weekly Limit. The Thai LPA states standard hours are 48/week, and maximum overtime is 36 hours. Therefore, absolute maximum legally allowed is 84 hours per week.
_comment_3: Law 3: The Rest Day Law. Thai law mandates at least 1 full day off per week (maximum 6 days of work).
